title: BEM-1163 dry-run recorder
objective:
Create file governance/runtime/dry_run_execution_recorder.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path


def run_and_record(output_path="governance/runtime/BEM1163_DRY_RUN_EXECUTION_RECORD.json"):
    commands = [[sys.executable, "governance/validators/run_bem931_validator_suite.py"]]
    results = []
    for cmd in commands:
        proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True, capture_output=True)
        results.append({"cmd": cmd, "returncode": proc.returncode, "stdout": proc.stdout.strip(), "stderr": proc.stderr.strip(), "ok": proc.returncode == 0})
    record = {"bem_id": "BEM-1163", "release_pass": False, "dry_run": True, "ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "results": results}
    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    Path(output_path).write_text(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return record

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run_and_record()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
